name: Alanis Morissette
bio: Alanis Morissette's catalog still earns because Jagged Little Pill remains a generational touchstone with strong songwriter-side value and durable replay behavior.
notable_for: Confessional alt-pop songwriting with unusually strong catalog permanence.
career_highlight: Jagged Little Pill continues to operate as one of the defining pop-rock albums of the 1990s.
